title: Bryar rifle

The '''Bryar rifle''' was a type of [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] that could fire small and fast shots, although it could also fire a 'charge,' one large and stronger shot.<ref name="Force Unleashed Campaign Guide" /> The Bryar rifle was heavy, and less accurate than other types of blaster [[Rifle/Legends|rifles]].<ref name="Force Unleashed Campaign Guide" />

Despite its weight and accuracy<ref name="Force Unleashed Campaign Guide" /> it was popular during the waning days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and could be modified to make a much more accurate [[Bryar pistol/Legends|Bryar pistol]]. In later times, Bryar rifles became a much sought-after collector's item.<ref name="Dark Forces Saga">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}}</ref>

[[Morgan Katarn]] owned a Bryar rifle which sawed it down into a Bryar pistol so that it wouldn't appear quite as old-fashioned; he passed it to his son, [[Kyle Katarn]], as a parting gift on the eve of his induction to the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]].<ref name="Dark Forces Saga" />
